query_normalized: statistical bias in pre-print server publication trends statistics
rationale: The paper focuses on media bias in news headlines and social media engagement, which is a distinct construct from the user's question regarding statistical bias in pre-print server publication trends. While both contain the word "bias," they refer to different domains (journalistic framing vs. statistical methodology) and different publication venues (news outlets vs. pre-print servers), satisfying the rejection rule for distinct constructs sharing only homonym keywords.
